title: How Rennrat Got 500m Views On YouTube Shorts

transcript.text: This faceless YouTube channel got almost a billion views posting 2D cartoons about moral lessons. Each of their stories covers a tragic [music] moment, but each one of them makes hundreds of dollars. Only in the last 30 days, they gained $47 million views and [music] made close to $36,000 because of a simple trick nobody seems to notice. Instead of talking about actual tragic events, their most popular videos are about a dad deleting his son's Minecraft world or a son who's forced to destroy his Xbox. Videos are almost impossible [music] to scroll past because they make you emotionally invested in the story.
